alerts.inventorySemantics: NC is fragmented by local ABC boards. Wake can expose store-level inventory, NC Stock Shipped Data gives board-level shipment evidence, and the NC warehouse page is statewide early-warning radar. Board/warehouse signals are useful planning intelligence but must not be described as exact shelf inventory.
alerts.reason: New board_warehouse nc_statewide_warehouse_stock signal for Henry McKenna 10 Year in NC.
alerts.evidence: NC ABC warehouse stock page shows 518 unit(s) available statewide for Henry McKenna Single Barrel (+0 since previous Bourbon Signal snapshot). This is early-warning radar only; it does not identify receiving boards or shelf inventory. NC ABC also flags this NC Code in its product-control spreadsheet (controlled distribution), which helps distinguish ordinary replenishment from high-demand controlled-product movement.
